action.reasoning: Observation: Tensor size mismatch 65535 vs 65536 in renderer _forward. This happens when I pass rays manually. Analysis: The built-in render method works fine (tested earlier with LPIPS=0.61). The issue is only when I call renderer directly with custom rays. Decision: Use the simplest approach - modify the nerf_renderer.py source file to store opacity, then use TripoSR's built-in render method which already works. This avoids all ray generation issues.
